metadata.name: idnft
metadata.description: IDNFT Protocol — Soulbound identity, session keys, and stake-backed credentials on X1 Network

accounts.name: reserve
docs: Reserve PDA — receives the new stake deposit

accounts.name: pool_stake
docs: Pool stake account PDA — lamport-only; funded and delegated separately

accounts.name: idnft_state
docs: IDNFT state is NOT closed — it persists as a permanent identity credential.

accounts.name: reserve
docs: Reserve PDA — source of withdrawal lamports

accounts.name: authority_profile
docs: Optional authority profile to inherit defaults from.

accounts.name: validator_entry
docs: Registered validator entry — constrains which pool_stake is valid

accounts.name: reserve
docs: Reserve PDA — lamport-only; receives SOL from mints, no data stored

accounts.name: asset_id_account
docs: asset_id PDA — derived from [b"idnft_asset", nonce.to_le_bytes()]

accounts.name: reserve
docs: Reserve PDA — receives the staked lamports

accounts.name: reserve
docs: does not disappear from the share price calculation.

accounts.name: reserve
docs: Reserve PDA — source of yield lamports

accounts.name: calling_program
docs: The calling application's program account — must be in allowed_program_ids and be executable.

accounts.name: app_registry
docs: Optional: app registry entry — checked for blocked status if provided

accounts.name: reserve
docs: Reserve PDA — source of yield lamports

accounts.name: destination
docs: Destination for the yield payment

accounts.name: session_signer
docs: The ephemeral session key must sign this transaction

errors.name: InsufficientStake
errors.msg: Insufficient stake amount for any class

errors.name: NotMatured
errors.msg: Vow identity has not yet matured

errors.name: AlreadyUnstaking
errors.msg: Vow identity is already in unstake state

errors.name: NotUnstaking
errors.msg: Vow identity is not in unstake state

errors.name: InvalidAssetId
errors.msg: Invalid asset ID for this nonce

errors.name: InvalidOwner
errors.msg: Invalid owner — Vow identity owner mismatch

errors.name: SessionInvalidated
errors.msg: Session was invalidated — identity unstaked or re-activated

errors.name: ProgramNotAllowed
errors.msg: Calling program is not in session's allowed_program_ids

errors.name: SharesUnderflow
errors.msg: Shares underflow — insufficient shares to burn

errors.name: ProfileIdTaken
errors.msg: Authority profile ID already in use

errors.name: TooManyProgramIds
errors.msg: Maximum allowed program IDs per session exceeded

errors.name: StakeNotDeactivated
errors.msg: Stake deactivation not yet complete — wait one epoch after begin_unstake

errors.name: StakeAlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: Pool stake account is already initialized as a Solana stake account

errors.name: StakeNotInitialized
errors.msg: Pool stake account has not been initialized yet — call initialize_pool_stake first

errors.name: StakeAlreadyDelegated
errors.msg: Pool stake account is already delegated

errors.name: StakeNotDelegated
errors.msg: Pool stake account is not delegated

errors.name: StakeStillActive
errors.msg: Pool stake account still has active delegation — deactivate first

errors.name: InsufficientStakeFunds
errors.msg: Pool stake account has insufficient lamports to cover rent and minimum delegation

errors.name: InvalidAccountPairs
errors.msg: Remaining accounts must be alternating (ValidatorEntry, PoolStake) pairs

errors.name: StakeAccountMismatch
errors.msg: Pool stake account does not match the validator entry's registered stake account

errors.name: InvalidValidatorEntry
errors.msg: Validator entry account is not owned by this program

errors.name: IdentityInactive
errors.msg: Vow identity has no active stake — call recommit to re-activate

errors.name: IdentityAlreadyActive
errors.msg: Vow identity already has an active stake position — unstake first

types.name: CommitmentRecord
docs: V2 — commitment reputation, non-transferable, wallet-bound.
Tracks historical commitment as a pure reputation metric.

types.name: IdNftState
docs: Soulbound identity NFT. The owner field is immutable after mint.
The account persists permanently on-chain as a historical identity
credential regardless of stake state. Two lifecycle states:
Active Identity:  active_stake == true   (sessions allowed, yield spendable)
Dormant Identity: active_stake == false  (identity preserved, no new sessions)
Reputation fields (first_staked_at, total_commitments, total_fulfilled,
cumulative_stake_days, highest_class_ever) are append-only — never reset
by unstake or activate_stake.

fields.name: sessions_invalidated_at
docs: Set by complete_unstake and activate_stake to expire existing sessions.

fields.name: active_stake
docs: Active Identity when true; Dormant Identity when false.
Sessions cannot be created and yield cannot be spent when false.

types.name: SessionAccount
docs: A session key authorization account. The PDA is derived from
[b"session", idnft_state, session_index_le4] so it can be recovered
deterministically from any device that knows the owner's wallet seed.
session_index is user-chosen (0, 1, 2, …) and maps to a human label
("Trading Bot", "Arena Game", "Mobile") that wallets can display.
The wallet derives the session keypair from the owner seed + index
using a standard derivation path — no private-key export needed.

fields.name: session_index
docs: Deterministic index chosen by the user. PDA seed uses this instead of
session_key so wallets can recover all sessions from the seed phrase alone.
